home.shortcutsDescription: Fast paths into writing, project showcases, the integrated Study Room, and contact entry.
home.recentPostsIntro: Latest posts from the portal publishing surface.
home.footerIntro: Keep the public portal and shared profile details easy to update from one place.

about.title: About Me
about.skillsIntro: Placeholder structure prepared for future refinement through data editing.

studyRoom.title: Study Room
studyRoom.ctaNote: The Study Room opens at /study-app/ as a standalone application under the same platform identity.
studyRoom.featuresIntro: The dedicated focus application now belongs to the same public platform contract as the portal.
studyRoom.empty: No Study Room features configured yet.

contact.title: Contact
contact.messageChecklistTitle: What To Include In Your Message

checklist.topic: what you are reaching out about
checklist.reply: how you would like me to reply

contact.topicPlaceholder: Project, collaboration, or a quick hello
contact.messagePlaceholder: A short introduction and your message

notes.formspreeReady: This form structure is ready for Formspree-style submission once the final endpoint is added.
notes.placeholderEndpoint: The endpoint is still a placeholder and must be replaced before public launch.
notes.futureBackend: In the long term, this flow may move behind the self-hosted backend service instead of staying on Formspree.

portal.searchPlaceholder: Search articles, pages, and project notes...

todo.title: Todo Panel
todo.description: Small task capture stays available as an overlay instead of permanently occupying the layout.

music.title: Music Panel
music.description: Ambient playback remains available without crowding the main focus scene.

statistics.title: Statistics Panel
statistics.description: Session counters and future progress views now live in a dedicated overlay surface.

settings.title: Settings Panel
settings.description: Timer configuration and shared preferences open as a floating panel instead of a separate dashboard route.

settings.title: Display and behavior
settings.intro: This settings center controls how the scene, timer, and local study runtime feel without touching the underlying Pomodoro engine.
settings.languageIntro: This choice updates shared UI labels across the Study Room and future connected surfaces.
settings.sceneIntro: Select the active scene now. Custom uploads will attach here in a later pass.
settings.customUploadsCopy: Future self-hosted scene uploads will be managed here without replacing the current video-scene registry.
settings.displayIntro: Change how the timer sits on top of the study scene without altering the timer engine or session progress.

center_focus.label: Center Focus
center_focus.description: The immersive centered timer remains the primary focus surface.

minimal_overlay.label: Minimal Overlay
minimal_overlay.description: A smaller overlay keeps the timer visible while letting the scene dominate.

corner_embed.label: Corner Embed
corner_embed.description: An unobtrusive corner timer shows only the essential study controls.

settings.timerIntro: Automatic rollover stays active while the durations and cadence stay user-configurable.
settings.completionBellCopy: Plays only when the timer naturally rolls into the next Pomodoro phase.
settings.audioCopy: Ambient playback is still running through the local source provider. A future cloud provider will plug into the music-source abstraction without replacing the existing playback controller.

source.localDescription: Bundled local ambience keeps the current Study Room self-contained and offline-safe.

deep-focus-placeholder.title: Deep Focus Placeholder
deep-focus-placeholder.note: Silent local placeholder used to exercise the audio controller.

late-night-placeholder.title: Late Night Placeholder
late-night-placeholder.note: Future local bundled ambience slot for packaged Study Room audio.

errors.blocked: Playback is blocked until the browser receives a user gesture.
errors.enableSound: Enable sound before starting ambient playback.

todo.title: Current todos
todo.intro: Compact local task list for the current study session.

statistics.title: Session counters
statistics.intro: The reducer already tracks completed sessions so this feature has a stable surface for future persistence and analytics.
statistics.futureCopy: Future backend sync can store session history, streaks, and per-user study summaries without changing how the timer feature reports completion.

auth.title: Future account layer
auth.intro: This slot is intentionally present now so account-linked Study Room state can be added later without reshaping the core pages.
auth.futureCopy: The backend service will eventually own login, session validation, and user-linked study data. Nothing here relies on Firebase-era browser auth.

coastalCafe.name: Coastal Cafe
coastalCafe.description: Bright open-air cafe loop for lighter daytime focus sessions.

retroDesk.name: Retro Desk
retroDesk.description: Warmer CRT desk loop with a denser night-study atmosphere.

aquariumRoom.name: Aquarium Room
aquariumRoom.description: Quiet indoor loop with aquarium glow for late-night deep work.
